posts.author: athobie (anthony thobie)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI,

I woulk like to know if you have standard API for Monday Projects and a Field Service solution
The logic of this integration will be :
• A flow Monday Projects to Our Field Service solution: For the creation of a service order at the launch of the project in Monday Projects for example
Data : Date, view activity dependencies, Project Manager, etc.
• A flow Our Solution to Monday Projects: Feedback on progress status and closure of service orders
o Details of services and costs associated with each service orders

Our customers could use your solution to: Manage project models, Create the project, Monitor the progress of the project.

Our solution would manage the execution of the service orders with all the complexity associated with the service orders: scheduling, Inventory, Availability and skills of resources, Associated documentation, Contract and pricing rules, etc.

Thanks for your help and Regards
Our SaaS solution can manage APIs with related applications to facilitate this integration work.

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Welcome to the community!

monday.com does have an API, as well as a custom integrations support through the Apps framework. I’ve linked to the relevant documentation. The apps framework allows the creation of automation templates which can be triggered when various values in monday.com change, to send data to a backend and integration to another platform.

You can also create automations which are triggered by the external platform via your backend, and cause changes in monday.com. Understanding monday.com automations and automation templates is critical to working with monday.com in a way that conforms to monday.com user expectations.

Apps Framework

What is a monday app?

Learn all about monday apps.

GraphQL API

monday.com GraphQL API

The monday GraphQL API allows developers to programmatically access and update data inside a monday.com account. It is part of the monday apps framework.

posts.author: vmd.nep (vmd.nep)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I’m curious to know if you offer standard APIs for integrating Monday Projects with Field Service solutions. Our company is looking to streamline our workflow by connecting these platforms. Specifically, we envision a seamless exchange of data between Monday Projects and our Field Service solution, facilitating the creation of service orders and providing feedback on project progress.

If you provide custom app development services, we’d love to explore the possibility of collaborating to create a tailored solution for our needs. Your expertise could greatly enhance the efficiency of our operations.

Looking forward to hearing from you.
